original_image_tags: Hand-drawn circle with the number "4" inside, located in the bottom left quadrant of the page.

elements.description: Typed military memo with header, subject line, body text, and signature block. At the bottom, there is a large, circled numeral '4'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a circled numeral '4', but Description A specifies it is hand-drawn while Description B does not specify its nature, and Description A mentions a specific location while B does not, adding the typed memo content which is ignored for visual image comparison.
